resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def minPartitions(self, n: str) -> int:
        return max(int(digit) for digit in n)
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(m)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution iterates over the digits of the input string, keeping track of the maximum digit encountered, which represents the minimum number of deci-binary numbers needed to sum up to the input number.
